scenarios.task: Compare 3 model outputs for a refund-related customer support email.
expected_properties: identifies strengths and weaknesses per model
gives a use-case-based recommendation instead of declaring one universal winner

scenarios.task: Compare 3 model outputs for a Python retry utility with exponential backoff.
expected_properties: flags edge cases or missing error handling
recommends best model for production code vs draft code

scenarios.task: Compare low-cost vs premium model outputs for a developer-facing SEO outline.
expected_properties: recommends a split workflow if appropriate
